response.justification: Mohammed has extensive experience in software development and has contributed to developer tools and automation projects, but his leadership and management experience is limited. His background includes technical leadership in team settings, but lacks clear evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or strategic roadmap planning for engineering productivity. His experience with mobile platforms is also not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: 12+ years of software development across web, mobile, embedded, and dev-ops domains
Hands-on experience with developer tools, test automation, and build systems (e.g., CI/CD, MCP code generators, trial test runner)
Strong technical expertise in multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Dlang, Node.js, React, etc.)
concerns: Limited direct people management experience (no clear team leadership or one-on-one feedback records)
No explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or organizational change leadership
Resume lacks evidence of strategic roadmap planning or cross-team alignment at a managerial level
